ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of tenants */,
  "tenants" INTEGER /* Number of tenants in the set */,
  "wall_time" REAL /* Wall time, representing execution time or duration */,
  "std_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of performance metrics */,
  "normalized_performance" REAL /* Normalized performance value, indicating relative performance */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the performance measurement */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the performance measurement */,
  "resource_usage" TEXT /* JSON object containing resource usage details */,
  "performance_tier" TEXT /* Performance tier associated with the set of tenants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenant_details" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "service_level_agreement" INTEGER /* Service level agreement details */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the tenant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tenant account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tenant account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tenant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenant_details_service_level_agreement FOREIGN KEY ("service_level_agreement") REFERENCES service_levels ("service_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_levels" (
  "service_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service level */,
  "service_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the service level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service level */,
  "performance_targets" TEXT /* Performance targets for the service level */,
  "max_wall_time" REAL /* Maximum allowed wall time for the service level */,
  "min_performance" REAL /* Minimum required performance for the service level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant receiving the allocation */,
  "resource_type" INTEGER /* Type of resource allocated (e.g., CPU, memory) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the allocated resource */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the allocation was made */,
  "allocated_until" TEXT /* Date until which the resource is allocated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_resource_type FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenant_details ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance log entry */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenant_details ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance alert */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_level" INTEGER /* Level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the alert */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_alerts_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenant_details ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_alerts_alert_level FOREIGN KEY ("alert_level") REFERENCES alert_levels ("alert_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_levels" (
  "alert_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert level */,
  "alert_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert level */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Performance threshold that triggers the alert level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_optimizations" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant */,
  "optimization_date" TEXT /* Date when the optimization was implemented */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optimization */,
  "optimization_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization type */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the optimization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_optimizations_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenant_details ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_optimizations_optimization_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("optimization_type_id") REFERENCES optimization_types ("optimization_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_types" (
  "optimization_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization type */,
  "optimization_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimization type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optimization type */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the optimization type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the service (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the tenant */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond to the tenant's feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenant_details ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_rating FOREIGN KEY ("rating") REFERENCES feedback_ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "numeric_value" INTEGER /* Numeric value of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance incident report */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_description FOREIGN KEY ("description") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenant_details ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "expected_resolution_time" INTEGER /* Expected time to resolve the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)
